finding_results.notes: Imani now uses probing follow-up questions about HR language and concrete household/material logistics (charger, cooler, food/location updates), while Theo keeps a direct boundary imperative ("Don't do the speech. Use it.") so the two voices remain distinct under pressure.

summary: Revised the kitchen-table pressure exchange to restore idiolect separation: Imani's cadence now blends probing inquiry with domestic pragmatics while Theo stays terse and boundary-forward.
